/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libleap_backend_avx512.so -o libleap_backend_avx512.so CMakeFiles/leap_backend_avx512.dir/home/minghao/project/2026/leapbench/leap/SIMD_ED.cc.o CMakeFiles/leap_backend_avx512.dir/home/minghao/project/2026/leapbench/leap/SHD.cc.o CMakeFiles/leap_backend_avx512.dir/home/minghao/project/2026/leapbench/leap/bit_convert.c.o CMakeFiles/leap_backend_avx512.dir/home/minghao/project/2026/leapbench/leap/mask.c.o CMakeFiles/leap_backend_avx512.dir/home/minghao/project/2026/leapbench/leap/popcount.c.o CMakeFiles/leap_backend_avx512.dir/home/minghao/project/2026/leapbench/leap/print.c.o CMakeFiles/leap_backend_avx512.dir/home/minghao/project/2026/leapbench/leap/shift.c.o CMakeFiles/leap_backend_avx512.dir/src/leap_backend.cpp.o
